02
ABOUT
My Story

Data speaks. People hesitate. I do both — and somehow make it look effortless.

I'm the kind of person who walks into a room full of numbers, silence, and confused faces, and leaves with a decision, a plan, and a much better process.

You see, numbers talk, but most people don't listen. I speak both fluently — translating everything that gets lost in the space between raw data and human behavior.

I'm still building, still collecting, and still very much the most interesting variable in any dataset I've ever been part of. Because somewhere in that quiet space where data meets people, where strategy finally moves a room — that is exactly where I choose to live.

Felt like something was missing in your last strategy meeting? That empty energy in the room was probably a me-shaped gap.

But I don't just bring solutions — I bring the culture.

Scroll down and you'll find the other side of that gap — the one that makes team lunches louder, office corridors funnier, and group chats dangerously entertaining.

Don't say you weren't warned. Let's build something together — the Contact section is right there waiting. 😉
